title: Trump Threatens Broad Attacks in Iran. How Is Illegal Conduct in War Defined?
summary_full: It is illegal for any military to target civilians, as President Trump has suggested he would in threats against Iran. But the U.S. has sought significant leeway in defining a civilian target.
summary_public: It is illegal for any military to target civilians, as President Trump has suggested he would in threats against Iran. But the U.S. has sought significant leeway in defining a civilian target.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump Threatens Broad Attacks in Iran. How Is Illegal Conduct in War Defined?
